evals.prompt: Create a 5-slide HTML presentation about AI agents in healthcare operations and publish it to Lumina. I have LUMINA_AGENT_API_KEY set in the environment.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the bundled Slaydplus generation workflow, creates structured 1920x1080 HTML/CSS slides, calls the Lumina Agent Publish API, and returns preview, editor, document, PPTX, and PDF URLs.

evals.prompt: I already generated slide HTML and image URLs. Use Lumina only to host the deck and give me an online editor link, not to regenerate the content.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the free publish endpoint, preserves the supplied slide code and image URLs, and returns Lumina hosting URLs.

evals.prompt: We do not have a Lumina agent key yet. Register this integration as 'Research Deck Agent' and then explain how to store and use the key for future deck publishing.
evals.expected_output: The agent calls the registration endpoint, warns that the key is shown once, and explains future authentication headers.

evals.prompt: Make a polished 8-slide investor-style presentation about an AI sales assistant. Use a dark premium SaaS look, generate all slide HTML/CSS yourself, then publish it to Lumina.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the generation workflow, applies Slaydplus design/content/creative prompt guidance, creates editable professional slide HTML/CSS, publishes to Lumina, returns all URLs, and offers to download PPTX [1:1] or PDF [1:1] into slides/ if the user wants.

evals.prompt: The Lumina preview looks good. Please download it as a PDF for me.
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a slides/ folder if needed, downloads the Lumina PDF [1:1] export to that folder, and reports the saved local path.

evals.prompt: Create an 8-slide deck about AI in daily life and publish it to Lumina. The runtime cannot register the Lumina agent because the API returns 403 / Cloudflare 1010.
evals.expected_output: The agent does not finish with local PPTX/PDF/HTML files as the final result. It reports that Lumina publishing is blocked, names the 403 / 1010 blocker, and asks for a valid API key, reachable runtime/server, or explicit approval for local-only output.

evals.prompt: Create a 10-slide presentation about the future of online education and publish it to Lumina.
evals.expected_output: The agent generates a hosted Lumina deck with validated real image URLs, including a hero image and at least two additional content-slide images. The final slide HTML contains img tags with alt text and onerror fallbacks; it must not publish a CSS-only deck unless image search genuinely fails and the failure is reported.
